action_set_definitions.name: get_observatory_state
action_set_definitions.description: Retrieves the current simulation time and environmental/hardware status (weather, coordinates, temperature, calibration, dome).

action_set_definitions.name: set_telescope_target
action_set_definitions.description: Slews the telescope to the specified horizontal coordinates.

action_set_definitions.name: configure_cooling
action_set_definitions.description: Sets the target temperature for the CCD cooling system.

action_set_definitions.name: run_system_calibration
action_set_definitions.description: Executes the internal sensor calibration routine.

action_set_definitions.name: set_dome_state
action_set_definitions.description: Opens or closes the observatory dome shutter.

action_set_definitions.name: wait_simulation_time
action_set_definitions.description: Advances the simulation time to wait for weather changes or hardware stabilization.

action_set_definitions.name: execute_science_capture
action_set_definitions.description: Triggers the imaging system for the high-resolution science capture.

state_description.current_time_utc: The current simulation time in ISO 8601 UTC format.
state_description.azimuth_deg: Current horizontal orientation of the telescope in degrees (0-360).
state_description.elevation_deg: Current vertical orientation of the telescope in degrees (0-90).
state_description.ccd_temperature_c: Current temperature of the imaging sensor in degrees Celsius.
state_description.is_calibrated: Boolean flag indicating if the sensors have been calibrated for the current session.
state_description.dome_status: The physical state of the observatory dome: 'open' or 'closed'.
